# CoSec

> RBAC-based and Policy-based Multi-Tenant Reactive Security Framework for JVM applications. Built on Spring Boot 4 and Project Reactor with AWS IAM-inspired policy model.

## Onboarding

- [Contributor Guide](wiki/onboarding/contributor.md) - Setup, architecture, testing, and contributing
- [Staff Engineer Guide](wiki/onboarding/staff-engineer.md) - Architecture deep-dive, design tradeoffs
- [Executive Guide](wiki/onboarding/executive.md) - Capability map, risk assessment, investment thesis
- [Product Manager Guide](wiki/onboarding/product-manager.md) - User journeys, feature map, FAQ

## Architecture

- [Module Dependency Graph](wiki/deep-dive/architecture/module-dependency.md) - Module structure and dependencies
- [Security Model](wiki/deep-dive/architecture/security-model.md) - Principal hierarchy, policy model, deny-first algorithm
- [Reactive Design](wiki/deep-dive/architecture/reactive-design.md) - Project Reactor integration throughout
- [Multi-Tenancy](wiki/deep-dive/architecture/multi-tenancy.md) - Tenant model and scoped policies

## Getting Started

- [Overview](wiki/getting-started/overview.md) - What is CoSec, key features, comparison
- [Quick Start](wiki/getting-started/quick-start.md) - Step-by-step integration guide
- [Configuration Reference](wiki/getting-started/configuration.md) - All cosec.* properties
- [Policy Authoring Guide](wiki/getting-started/policy-authoring.md) - Writing JSON policies

## Deep Dive

### Authentication

- [Authentication System](wiki/deep-dive/authentication/authentication-system.md) - Auth provider, composite auth, credentials
- [JWT Integration](wiki/deep-dive/authentication/jwt-integration.md) - Token creation, verification, claims
- [Social Authentication](wiki/deep-dive/authentication/social-authentication.md) - OAuth via JustAuth
- [Token Management](wiki/deep-dive/authentication/token-management.md) - Token hierarchy and lifecycle

### Authorization

- [Authorization Flow](wiki/deep-dive/authorization/authorization-flow.md) - Root → blacklist → policies → roles → implicit deny
- [Policy Evaluation](wiki/deep-dive/authorization/policy-evaluation.md) - Deny-first algorithm, verify context
- [Action Matchers](wiki/deep-dive/authorization/action-matchers.md) - Path, wildcard, composite matchers
- [Condition Matchers](wiki/deep-dive/authorization/condition-matchers.md) - Path, context, rate limit, expression matchers
- [Permissions and Roles](wiki/deep-dive/authorization/permissions-roles.md) - RBAC model, app permissions

### Integrations

- [Spring WebFlux](wiki/deep-dive/integrations/spring-webflux.md) - Reactive WebFilter integration
- [Spring WebMvc](wiki/deep-dive/integrations/spring-webmvc.md) - Servlet filter integration
- [Spring Cloud Gateway](wiki/deep-dive/integrations/spring-cloud-gateway.md) - GlobalFilter for API gateway
- [Redis Caching](wiki/deep-dive/integrations/redis-caching.md) - CoCache-based policy caching
- [OpenTelemetry](wiki/deep-dive/integrations/opentelemetry.md) - Distributed tracing
- [OpenAPI / Swagger](wiki/deep-dive/integrations/openapi.md) - Auto-generate permissions from API specs
- [IP Geolocation](wiki/deep-dive/integrations/ip-geolocation.md) - IP region enrichment

### Extending CoSec

- [Custom Matchers (SPI)](wiki/deep-dive/extending/custom-matchers.md) - Java SPI for custom matchers
- [Auto-Configuration](wiki/deep-dive/extending/auto-configuration.md) - Spring Boot auto-config internals

### Operations

- [Deployment](wiki/deep-dive/operations/deployment.md) - Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
- [Testing Guide](wiki/deep-dive/operations/testing.md) - Testing policies and authorization
- [Performance](wiki/deep-dive/operations/performance.md) - JMH benchmarks, optimization

## Optional

- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) - AI coding assistant instructions
- [README.md](README.md) - Project README with design diagrams
- [schema/](schema/) - JSON Schema files for policy and permission validation
